rewritten_requirements: The system shall allow applicants to apply for a visa from anywhere and at any time.
The system shall allow applicants to register with a valid email and password.
The system shall verify the correctness of applicant credentials prior to permitting login.
The system shall support after logging in, the system shall display the application form with necessary details and allow attachment of required documents.
The system shall present a list of available visa types for applicant selection.
The system shall enable applicants to view fee and requirement information for each country's visa application.
The system shall permit applicants to modify or delete their applied details.
The system shall allow administrators to view details of applicants' required visas.
The system shall enable administrators to update or delete applicants' details.
The system shall provide administrators with a means of interacting with the Visa Consultant Officer.
The system shall allow Visa Consultant Officers to view and verify document proofs submitted by applicants.
The system shall grant Visa Consultant Officers the authority to accept or reject visa applications.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system allows applicants to apply for a visa from anywhere and at any time.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The overall aim of the system is that the applicant can apply for the visa from anywhere and at any time.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Applicants can register by providing a valid email and password.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The applicant should register by providing a valid email and a password.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system checks the correctness of applicant credentials before allowing login.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The credentials are checked for correctness and the applicant to allow to log in.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Once logged in, applicants can view the application form with necessary details and attach required documents.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Once the applicant logs in, he/she will be shown the application form which asks the applicant to provide the necessary details and asks him/her to attach the necessary documents.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system provides a list of available visa types for applicants to choose from.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: It also provides a list of visas to choose from.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Applicants can view details of fees and requirements for each country's visa application.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: He/she can also view the details of fair to visa for each country.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Applicants can modify or delete their applied details.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The applicant can view, modify and delete the details applied.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Administrators can view details of applicants' required visas.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The system will have a provision for the administrator to view the details of what types of visas are required by the applicant.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Administrators can update or delete applicants' details.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The administrator will also be able to update and delete the details of the applicants.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Administrators have a facility to interact with the Visa Consultant Officer.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The administrator will have a facility to interact with the Visa Consultant Officer.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Visa Consultant Officers can view and check document proofs submitted by applicants.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The Visa Consultant Officer can be able to view and check the document proofs (valid passport, Demand Draft Visa Fee I-20 form, letter of admission, aid letter, etc.) submitted by the applicant

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Visa Consultant Officers have authority to accept or reject visa applications.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: He/She has the authority to accept/reject the visa application applied by the applicant (Figures 30.1–30.9).
